title: Cluster load status for job submission
query_text: Is the cluster under heavy load right now? Should I submit my job immediately or wait?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Yes, the cluster is under heavy load. The GPU partition is fully allocated (100%) with 35 pending jobs, and the standard partition is at 94% utilisation. Queue pressure has been rising all morning. If your job targets the GPU partition, you should expect a wait of many hours. For the standard partition, a short job may be scheduled within 1–2 hours. The scheduling_faq.md suggests submitting now so the job enters the queue rather than waiting to submit.
